title: Chapter 84
content:
Chapter 84: Chapter 84: Peak Earth Spirit Realm

Damon could feel the raw, surging power coursing through every meridian and fiber of his body.

’Haah... It feels good to get stronger like this...’

’System, continue the advancement to the Ninth Level of Earth Spirit Realm.’

[Cultivation increased! First Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Second Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -10oo lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Second Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Third Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -2oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Third Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Fourth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -4oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Fourth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Fifth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -8oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Fifth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Sixth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -16oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Sixth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Seventh Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -32oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Seventh Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Eighth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -64oo0 lust points.]

[Cultivation increased! Eighth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → Ninth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -128oo0 lust points.]

Again, Damon could feel the raw, surging power coursing through every meridian and fiber of his body, a torrent of refined spiritual energy that hummed with dominance. It was stronger and more dense that before.

His true cultivation now at the Ninth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. It put his cultivation above all three of his girls now.

The gap was not a problem, the problem was his yang qi.

The denser and rich Yang Qi circulating within him would flow far more efficiently into their cultivation, it will accelerate their growth at a pace that would have been impossible before.

Especially Ariel who the lowest in term of her cultivation. With who potent and rich his yang qi now, i would make her jump and breakthrough her cultivation like crazy.

But advancement without direction was reckless, and Damon was never reckless.

He needed the detailed information from the Sect Leader regarding the Eastern Continent Tournament.

Only with those details could he properly calibrate how far and how quickly he should push the girls’ cultivation forward.

If their cultivation climbed too steeply, too suddenly, it will drawing unwanted problem for them.

A careful, measured approach was the only acceptable path forward.

Then he ask the system again.

’System, how much for my spiritual root upgrade to Heaven Grade - Peak?’

[It will cost host 50,000 each level.]

Then he look at his current lust point again.

[Lust points: 1,400,000]

’Hmm... Do it.’

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - Low → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - Mid. -50000 lust points.]

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - Mid → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - High. -50000 lust points.]

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - High → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Heaven Grade - Peak. -50000 lust points.]

’Good, How about the advancement to Heavenly Spirit Realm?’

[I will cost you 1,000,000 lust point host.]

’Shit! I still nee to save up so point. then, how much the Heaven Grade Spiritual Root Advancement Pill?’

[Spiritual Root Advancement Pill, Heaven Grade - Flawless will cost you 50000 lust points each.]

’Okay, buy three of them.’

[You bought three Heaven Grade Spiritual Root Advancement Pill - Flawless Purity, -150,000 lust points.]

’Good... Now I have pills for the girls. Let’s see my current status.’

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level]

[True Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 80, Water: 80, Ice: 80, Wind: 80, Earth: 80, Lightning: 330, Nature: 80, Light: 80, Dark: 80, Sword: 115] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 1,250,000]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

’This should be enough for now,’ Damon thought, his golden eyes scanning the glowing status window before dismissing it with a blink.

’Before I can truly injure Selene with my full power and concentrated sword aura. But with my current level of strength, killing any ordinary cultivator in the Heavenly Spirit Realm is well within reach. That much is certain.’

Satisfied with that conclusion, he set aside the lingering weight of ambition and turned his attention to the three sleeping figures curled against him.

Their warmth was soft and steady, their breathing slow and peaceful.

He began carefully, methodically drawing upon their ambient Yin Qi, cycling it through his meridians in a measured flows and letting the gentle energy flows smoothly out the rough edges of his cultivation base and stabilize the internal pressure that had been building since his recent advancement.

The process was quiet and deeply centering, the Yin Qi weaving through him like silk threads drawing a fraying tapestry back into order.

****

Morning arrived without ceremony. Pale amber light slipped through the latticed windows, casting long, quiet patterns across the wooden floor.

Damon opened his eyes slowly, blinking away the last traces of a deep and restful sleep.

The room was immaculate — the folded blankets, tidied surfaces, and faint lingering trace of a spiritual fragrance told him everything before he even turned his head.

Beside him, sitting in composed silence with her long dark blue hair already pinned back into a neat arrangement, was Ariel.

She had already changed into her inner disciple robes, the pale fabric draped elegantly over her petite frame, her soft blue eyes catching the morning light as she looked up and met his gaze with a radiant smile.

"Good morning, Damon." She greeted Damon with her usual lovely smile.

"Morning, Ariel. You go ahead, I will clean up first." as he stood up and he moves toward the bathroom to wash his body.
